name: data-editor
description: Open and use the local data editor inside Codex, preferring direct in-app browser opening.

interface.shortDescription: Open the local JSON and CSV editor directly in Codex
interface.longDescription: Data Editor should prefer opening the local project data editor directly in the Codex in-app browser, only falling back to plain-text instructions when direct browser control is unavailable.
defaultPrompt: Open the data editor directly in the Codex in-app browser.
Use Browser to open data-editor in Codex.
